name: salesforce-ai-agent-mcp
description: Production-grade MCP server for the Salesforce Developer AI Agent — integrates Jira Cloud, Salesforce Tooling API, and n8n workflows
author: Salesforce AI Agent Team

tools.name: jira_get_story
tools.description: Fetch a Jira story by issue key

tools.name: jira_update_story_status
tools.description: Transition a Jira story to a new workflow status

tools.name: jira_post_comment
tools.description: Post a comment to a Jira story

tools.name: salesforce_get_object_fields
tools.description: Query all fields on a Salesforce object

tools.name: salesforce_create_custom_field
tools.description: Create a custom field on a Salesforce object

tools.name: salesforce_create_validation_rule
tools.description: Create a validation rule on a Salesforce object

tools.name: salesforce_query
tools.description: Execute a SOQL query against Salesforce

tools.name: n8n_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Trigger an n8n workflow via webhook URL

tools.name: n8n_get_execution_status
tools.description: Retrieve the status of an n8n workflow execution
